scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev -w desktop"
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build -w ui && npm run desktop:prebuild && npm run build -w desktop
scripts.desktop:build:mac: npm run build -w ui && npm run desktop:prebuild && npm run build:mac -w desktop
scripts.desktop:build:win: npm run build -w ui && npm run desktop:prebuild && npm run build:win -w desktop
